companies.title: Our Certified Companies
companies.description: Discover the trusted businesses that have successfully completed their ASQA certification and joined our community of excellence.
companies.searchPlaceholder: Search companies by name, location, or industry...

internationalParties.title: International Parties
internationalParties.description: Explore the international organizations, accreditation bodies, and global partners officially connected with ASQA in the areas of conformity assessment, certification, standardization, accreditation, and quality assurance. These collaborations support alignment with internationally recognized standards and help local companies and institutions obtain trusted certifications and quality services in accordance with global requirements. Through these strategic partnerships, ASQA strengthens the credibility, recognition, and international acceptance of local products and services in regional and global markets.
internationalParties.emptyDescription: There are no international parties to display right now.

header.title: Our Services
header.description: Comprehensive certification services for companies worldwide

process.title: Certification Process
process.description: A straightforward path to ASQA certification

1.title: Initial Consultation
1.description: Discuss your certification needs and requirements with our experts

2.title: Company Registration
2.description: Register your company details in our system

3.title: Document Submission
3.description: Upload all required documentation for review

4.title: Compliance Review
4.description: Our team reviews your submission against ASQA standards

5.title: Site Assessment
5.description: Optional on-site or virtual assessment of your facilities

6.title: Certification Issuance
6.description: Receive your official ASQA certificate upon approval

benefits.title: Benefits of ASQA Certification
benefits.description: Why companies choose ASQA for their certification needs

2.title: Enhanced Credibility
2.description: Build trust with clients and stakeholders

cta.title: Ready to Get Certified?
cta.description: Start your certification journey today with our simple online registration process

header.title: Contact Us
header.description: Get in touch with our team for any questions or support

form.title: Send us a Message
form.successMessage: Thank you for your message! We'll get back to you soon.

map.title: Visit Our Office
map.description: Our team is available for in-person consultations during business hours. Please schedule an appointment in advance.

1.question: How long does the certification process take?
1.answer: The certification process typically takes 2-3 weeks from initial registration to final approval.

2.question: What documents are required for registration?
2.answer: Required documents include business license, tax registration, and company incorporation documents.

3.question: Is ASQA certification internationally recognized?
3.answer: Yes, ASQA certification is recognized in over 50 countries worldwide.

4.question: How can I check my application status?
4.answer: You can track your application status through your company dashboard or contact our support team.
